subject: Re: Test
body:
Here are a few more details:

Development - 80%
    Provides input to the definition of organizational coding standards
    Produces estimates for their assigned tasks and participates in estimation for larger initiatives including up front project planning
    Produces performant code with a special emphasis on stability and long-term supportability
    Promotes reusability of code with an eye for opportunities of reuse across teams/systems
    Produces code that is adequately unit tested and meets requirements for system/integration testing
    Responsible for documentation of their code and external documentation of a system or project
    Participates in designing entire components and interaction between components
    Supports project management team in decomposing business requirements into individual tasks
    Deep understanding of libraries and common components (frameworks)
    A key reviewer of PRs for their project team
    Participates in the initial implementation of new patterns
    First line developer support for production systems - troubleshooting/triage
    May participate in interviews

Mentoring - 20%
    Support developers by answering team member's conceptual and technical questions
    Help developers improve the maintainability, performance, and security of their code through code reviews
    Provides dedicated mentorship to new or inexperienced members of the team (ex: rotational candidates, new employees, or new members of a team)


  1.  General Qualifications

    Proficient with design methods/patterns (e.g., DRY, SOLID, ReST) and their practical application
    Excellent team player with good communication skills with both non-technical & technical co-workers
    Highly motivated and driven by a desire to solve difficult problems, and learn new technology
    Expert in writing quality unit tests
    Expert with build and debug tools
    Proficient with profiling tools
    Experience with continuous integration systems like Jenkins/GitHub
    Experience with international software development (multi-lingual, multi-currency, geographic, and locale awareness)
    Proficient in MacOS, Unix, and Linux
    Experience with Docker, or equivalent container technology, is preferred
    Experience with agile practices and tools preferred (Jira or similar)
    Experience with database concepts (queries, data models)
    Understanding of development in a distributed system
    Understanding of core networking concepts like http protocol and its usage


Kristy Lariviere
Klariviere@rmcagency.com
734-748-4781
RMC,LLC.
________________________________
From: Shuzi Gong <galiana18@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, 24 June 2026 19:32:42
To: Kristy Lariviere <klariviere@rmcagency.com>
Subject: Re: Test

Hi  Kristy,

The external focus (cross-team collaboration) and the emphasis on long-term maintainability, stability, and system architecture mentioned in this JD align with the core strengths of my work over the past few years.

I am deeply driven by business logic and focused on delivering tangible profitability to the organization. As such, I am not only capable of independently refactoring and designing complex subsystems, but I also genuinely enjoy fulfilling that mentoring responsibility, including conducting high-quality PR reviews and helping our teams grow.

I think I should be able to handle a role like this. Do you know what else they're really looking for? For example, were there any common reasons why some candidates got passed over?

Thank you for your kind help.

Nina
On Wednesday, June 24, 2026 at 05:11:54 PM MDT, Kristy Lariviere <klariviere@rmcagency.com> wrote:



When I send the role  I get undeliverable. Here is a piece of the JD. Please let me know your thoughts.



A Software Engineer III demonstrates proficiency in the technology of concern.  They develop with more of an external focus  encompassing other teams and how the software interacts with other parts of the organization.



They are proficient in the programming language and core library, including its more complex parts, numerous 3rd party libraries, and the tooling around development, building, debugging, testing, and deploying applications.  They understand, at a moderate level, all components that make up the system and their inter-relationships and communication patterns. They can use this knowledge to develop complex subsystems using the principals they've learned and with an eye towards an approach with the idioms and patterns already present in the code and team.  They have a deep understanding of the subset of components on which they are working and can mentor less experienced developers in the design of their code and the larger development ecosystem used within the project.



A Software Engineer III is expected to consistently write high quality code, of a medium to high complexity, in a timely manner.  This includes accounting for things like performance, maintainability, and security.  In addition, its expected that they are proficient in all the standards, practices, guidelines, and idioms of the team and apply them as they are coding.


Duties



Development - 80%

  *   Provides input to the definition of organizational coding standards
  *   Produces estimates for their assigned tasks and participates in estimation for larger initiatives including up front project planning
  *   Produces performant code with a special emphasis on stability and long-term supportability
  *   Promotes reusability of code with an eye for opportunities of reuse across teams/systems
  *   Produces code that is adequately unit tested and meets requirements for system/integration testing
  *   Responsible for documentation of their code and external documentation of a system or project
  *   Participates in designing entire components and interaction between components
  *   Supports project management team in decomposing business requirements into individual tasks
  *   Deep understanding of libraries and common components (frameworks)
  *   A key reviewer of PRs for their project team
  *   Participates in the initial implementation of new patterns
  *   First line developer support for production systems - troubleshooting/triage
  *   May participate in interviews



Mentoring - 20%

  *   Support developers by answering team member's conceptual and technical questions
  *   Help developers improve the maintainability, performance, and security of their code through code reviews
  *   Provides dedicated mentorship to new or inexperienced members of the team (ex: rotational candidates, new employees, or new members of a team)

subject: Gong # Quick introduction
body:
Hello Shuzi,

 

Thanks for quick response, I guess you have seen below JD . 

 

Kindly fill below intro email to understand your profile.

 

Job description

 

Summary

Job Title: UKG integration Developer with 9+yrs exp

Location: OPEN 

 

Skills

Dell Boomi

UKG Workforce Management

legacy Kronos environments

REST APIs

XML

JSON

SOAP

Integration

 

Position Overview

Client is seeking a highly experienced UKG Integration Consultant with extensive expertise in UKG Workforce Management (formerly Kronos) and Dell Boomi integration development. This is a critical role requiring a consultant who possesses deep technical and functional knowledge of the UKG ecosystem and has successfully delivered complex enterprise integrations.

The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience supporting organizations that have transitioned from Kronos to UKG, with a strong understanding of both legacy Kronos environments and modern UKG platforms.

 

Required Skills & Experience:

- Strong hands-on experience with UKG Workforce Management (UKG Pro WFM / UKG Dimensions).

- Deep knowledge of Kronos Workforce Central and related modules.

- Proven experience participating in or leading Kronos-to-UKG migration and transformation projects.

- Extensive experience building, enhancing, and supporting integrations using Dell Boomi.

- Strong understanding of UKG APIs, data exchange frameworks, and integration architecture.

- Experience integrating UKG with HRIS, Payroll, ERP, Benefits, and other enterprise systems.

- Ability to troubleshoot complex integration issues and optimize existing interfaces.

- Experience working with inbound/outbound interfaces, middleware solutions, and data mapping.

- Strong understanding of workforce management processes including:

- Time & Attendance

- Scheduling

- Labor Management

- Accruals

- Workforce Analytics

 

Preferred Qualifications:

- Direct experience supporting both legacy Kronos environments and modern UKG implementations.

- Experience with enterprise-scale UKG deployments.

- Knowledge of REST APIs, XML, JSON, SOAP, and integration best practices.

- Prior automotive, manufacturing, or large enterprise experience is a plus.

- Excellent stakeholder communication and documentation skills.

body:
Good morning,

Thank you for your interest in employment with the Department of Children and Families. Applicants are required to submit a completed State of New Jersey Application for Employment with their resume at the time of application. Failure to do so will result in disqualification for this position. Please return this application no later than tomorrow, June 18, 2026 by 5pm. Please disregard this email if you have already completed the State of NJ Application.

Please find the link to the application listed below:

DPF-663.pdf<https://www.nj.gov/csc/about/publications/forms/pdf/DPF-663.pdf>

I hope you find this information helpful.

Thanks,

Office of Human Resources

<https://hire.glider.ai/requestExtension/RTuTGP3d9GrrCmf3J/XKjGNjwJkpmybBjmX>

subject: Bank Of America | Full Stack Developer
body:
Hello Shuzi,



As discussed, please find the RTR, below. Kindly acknowledge and send it back to me as soon as possible.

Exclusive Right to Represent & Certifications & Signature



Full Legal Name:

Rate:                $68/hr. W2 (All inclusive)





In consideration of the Artech Information Systems certification process, interview process, and consideration for this assignment with Bank Of America, I hereby give Artech the exclusive right to submit me as a qualified candidate to that client. I understand that this is not an offer of employment.  If Artech decides to engage me, I understand that this engagement must be offered in writing by a duly authorized representative of Artech.  This exclusive agreement will remain in effect for thirty (30) days from the date noted above.



I confirm, certify, and attest that my resume, education, all assessments, and technical tests administered by Artech have been completed in good faith and to the best of my ability. I also hereby confirm that all the information provided on my resume, including education, the last 10 years of employment, and the Artech forms is true, accurate, and verifiable.

Vaibhav Chauhan

subject: NEED
body:
Hello,

Hope you are doing great. Kindly go  through the below job description and
share me your updated profile:

 

 

Client: BNY mellon


Location: jersey City, NJ


Onsite: 4 days a week


Rate: $62.98/hr on apex w-2


Contract: 6-12 months to perm


Interview process: video interview and onsite interview (must onsite
interview, I have contractors on this team and everyone has to face to face)


Must have: angular, typescript, javascript, UX, and good communication
skills, and API experience, and some devops. 

Job Description: 

. Practical knowledge of Angular v18+ and TypeScript . Good understanding of
UI/UX design
principles 

. Write clean and efficient JavaScript, CSS, and HTML codes.

. Coordinate with the backend team to create, test, and execute code that
merges with API endpoints.

. Connect with other team members, such as UX designers, project managers,
and
backend-developers to deliver quality work.

. Analyze and resolve debugging issues in the application code to maintain
the
sustainability of the application.

. Manage all code compliance with respect to the standards set by the
company.

. Create system configuration functions using a component-based
architecture.

. Perform troubleshooting bugs and issue resolution.

. Hands-on experience in developing modularized or template-based
implementation.

. Able to work on Devops and change management 

. Able work independently& leading work effort.

 

 

 

 

 

Thanks & Regards,


 



 

Suchismita Mohanty

AutoPay Addendum
By enrolling in AutoPay, you have authorized PUBLIC STORAGE to charge the payment account automatically each month either as a credit or debit card transaction or an electronic debit entry to your checking account on or after the due date set forth in your Rental Agreement with PUBLIC STORAGE (the "Rental Agreement") and to apply said charge towards the amount of the monthly rent designated in your Rental Agreement or as that amount may change from time to time as disclosed in notices that PUBLIC STORAGE will send to you and any other taxes, fees or charges that may occur. You understand that you will remain responsible for monthly charges and additional late fees should there be insufficient funds or credit available or if your credit card is canceled or otherwise made unavailable for payment.
You understand that it shall remain your obligation to notify PUBLIC STORAGE in writing or orally two (2) days in advance of your intent to terminate your tenancy. You further understand that if you vacate your space(s) without advising PUBLIC STORAGE your account will be charged for the final balance due on the date that PUBLIC STORAGE becomes aware that you have vacated the storage space(s).
You agree that your authorization will remain in full force and effect until you choose to cancel the AutoPay authorization by going online at PublicStorage.com in My Account, or by calling our Customer Service Center at 1-800-567-0759 to advise that you are revoking your authorization. You understand that PUBLIC STORAGE requires at least 30 days’ prior notice in order to cancel this authorization if you choose to cancel it by calling our Customer Service Center.
You can change your AutoPay settings (payment method, enrollment, etc.) by logging into My Account on PublicStorage.com or by visiting any Public Storage location nationwide.

subject: Your AutoPay is now turned off
body:
Don’t forget to pay another way
Hi shuzi,
Just a quick note confirming that you’ve turned off AutoPay for Space #C005.
Even though you’ve deactivated automatic payments, you still have more ways to pay:
Even without AutoPay, we make payments simple.
  • Download and pay on the Public Storage App.
  • Login or do Quick Pay on PublicStorage.com
  • Visit a Public Storage Facility to pay at the office or kiosk.
  • Pay by phone by dialing 866-444-4747 (for a small fee).
Make sure you take a minute to pay off your balance or next month’s rent with one of these alternatives.

subject: Torc Skills Assessment
body:
Hey Shuzi,
===============================================

We're excited to invite you to take the next step in your journey with Torc — a quick assessment designed to highlight your skills and help open doors to new opportunities.

Your personalized WMT - Back-end Node assessment is ready: https://torc.ropes.ai/interview/3c86de

We recommend completing it within the next 5 days.


Here's why it's worth your time:


**Get recognized for what you do best**

Once you complete the assessment, you'll earn skill badges that showcase your expertise. These badges help us — and future clients — see what makes you great at what you do.


**One-and-done, with long-term benefits**

You only need to take the assessment once, and we'll use it to match you with multiple opportunities. No repeated testing — just more visibility and potential gigs.


**We've got your back**

Round 1: Take-Home Project
All the details are in the doc above. Here's a quick overview:
Deadline: Thursday, June 4, 11 AM EST
Format: Submit your code and documentation on GitHub
Along with this, share a short video walking us through what you’ve built, including a walkthrough of the code.
Round 2: Coding Round
Duration: 45 mins
Objectives: Test your backend Python skills and SQL database skills
Format:
Review of your take-home assignment
1 low-level system design question
1 Python backend question
1 SQL database question
This will be a live coding round. We're looking for clean, structured code.
Once you complete the assignment, please book time on Utsav's (Kaaj Founder) calendar here: https://calendly.com/utsav-kaaj/30min

subject: Required details: AI UI Engineer -Santa Clara, CA
body:
Required  Details:

Full name: 

Email:

DL And Visa copy :

Contact no:

DOB (Must Have):

Current Location: 

Last Four Digit SSN.

LinkedIn id:

Full educational Details: 

References: 

 

 

 

From: Anurag Dubey <anurag.dubey@vyzeinc.com> 
Sent: Friday, May 29, 2026 10:10 AM
To: 'galiana18@yahoo.com' <galiana18@yahoo.com>
Cc: 'jade@pilottechnologies.net' <jade@pilottechnologies.net>
Subject: JD: AI UI Engineer -Santa Clara, CA

 

Job Description -

AI UI Engineer -

Santa Clara, CA
Client : Accenture 
Work Location: Santa Clara
Resource needs to be local


Must-Have skills for

1)JAVASCRIPT 

2)REACT.JS 

3) CSS3 

4) GENAI


Nice-to-have skills:

 1)HTML5

 2)NODE.JS


Years of experience needed: 5+

 

Work Setup: Onsite in Santa Clara, CA. The role allows non-local talent but
travel and relocation expenses are not covered by the client.

Business Driver: Backed by CM&T Level 9 initiatives to build high-stakes
proofs of value and rapid AI prototyping for executives.

Deliverables: Functional prototypes, structural documentation for team
handoffs, and maintained "happy path" AI software demo workflows.

Interview Process: Standard evaluation rounds assessing rapid coding
instincts, front-end visual quality, and basic full-stack AI comfort. High
extension probability.

TOP HARD SKILLS
JavaScript / Front End Development: 5+ years (Expert level, Lit.js highly
preferred)
React.js & CSS3: 5+ years of building clean, dynamic user interfaces
GenAI Integration / Full Stack: 1+ years (working with LLM APIs, prompt
architecture, or chatbot modules)

NICE-TO-HAVES

Node.js & HTML5
ServiceNow platform development experience
Executive-facing demo or Innovation Lab experience
Strong documentation habits

DISQUALIFIERS
Candidate demands 100% remote or hybrid capabilities (Role is strictly
in-office in Santa Clara).
Missing core JavaScript infrastructure capabilities or has under 4-5 years
of engineering experience.
Unwilling to work on temporary, high-iteration prototypes (seeking long-term
platform maintenance only).

 

POSITION OVERVIEW

The CM&T team is seeking a high-quality, resourceful AI UI Engineer to build
and maintain executive-level AI demonstrations and proofs of value. The
primary mission of this innovation-focused team is to rapidly prototype
concepts into polished, digestible demo experiences that vividly showcase
how customers utilize ServiceNow products. This is a demo-first, highly
dynamic engineering role rather than a traditional platform development
position.

DAY-TO-DAY RESPONSIBILITIES

*	Build and maintain interactive AI-powered demos and POCs tailored
for executive and customer audiences.
*	Develop crisp front-end experiences using modern JavaScript, with an
emphasis on Lit.js frameworks.
*	Implement full-stack web solutions that directly integrate advanced
agentic AI and GenAI capabilities.
*	Rapidly prototype "happy path" demo flows designed to explicitly
communicate strategic business value.
*	Continuously maintain and iterate on demo quality over time to
ensure reusable, sustained product presentations.
*	Collaborate closely with a lean, highly innovative team while
documenting demo layouts for seamless handoffs.

TOP 3 REQUIRED SKILLS

*	JavaScript (Expert / P4): 5+ years of experience (Lit.js experience
highly preferred).
*	React.js & Front End Development: 5+ years of experience with
comprehensive UI architecture.
*	GenAI / Agentic AI Integration: 1+ years of experience building
prompt-driven workflows, LLM interfaces, or widget-based AI experiences.

ADDITIONAL DESIRED SKILLS

*	CSS3 & HTML5
*	Node.js (Full Stack capabilities)
*	Prior ServiceNow development/ecosystem experience
*	Executive, sales demo, or Innovation Lab project experience

IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE

The ideal candidate is a "scrappy", production-grade Full Stack/UI Engineer
who possesses strong front-end visual instincts and thrives in high-velocity
prototyping environments. They should be comfortable turning ambiguous ideas
into clear, executive-ready experiences, shifting away from heavy platform
architectural constraints in favor of rapid, meaningful feature
presentation. A background in engineering or an equivalent technical field
with clear documentation habits fits this team culture perfectly.

Job Responsibilities

*	Rapidly design, build, and iterate on AI-powered interactive
demonstrations and POC flows targeted for executive and customer audiences.
*	Develop modern front-end application layers with a strong technical
emphasis on JavaScript and Lit.js frameworks.
*	Implement full-stack logic that smoothly incorporates Generative AI
capabilities, prompt-driven widgets, and LLM integrations.
*	Document demo configurations thoroughly to ensure structural
stability and seamless project transitions across internal teams.

 

 

 

Thanks & Regards ......*  



Anurag Dubey

Senior Technical Recruiter  

24718 Tribe Square #306, Dulles, VA 20166 

Email : Anurag.dubey@vyzeinc.com <mailto:Anurag.dubey@vyzeinc.com>  | PH:
5714636600

24718 Tribe Square #306, Dulles, VA 20166 

Email : Anurag.dubey@vyzeinc.com <mailto:Anurag.dubey@vyzeinc.com>  | PH:
5714636600

UI React Developer 

Location: Phoenix AZ 

  6- 9 Years of experience in Java, React / React JSFront-End Development: Design and implement highly responsive user interface components using React JS concepts, hooks, and workflows like Redux or Flux.Back-End Development: Develop scalable server-side services and RESTful APIs using Java and the Spring Boot framework.Integration: Integrate front-end elements with server-side logic to ensure seamless application functionality.Optimization: Profile and improve application performance for maximum speed and cross-browser compatibility.Database: Experience with relational databases like Oracle, PostgreSQL, or MySQL, including proficiency in SQL.DevOps & Tools: Familiarity with Git for version control, Docker for containerization, and CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab)

Job Description -

Job Title: AI UI Engineer
Location: Santa Clara, California 95050  (In-office requirement; non-local talent considered but must work onsite)
Duration: 6 Months
Client: Accenture
Need strong LinkedIn

( candidate should have given an id verification called persona)

Need local candidate only 

Visa: No restrictions

 

POSITION OVERVIEW
The CM&T team is seeking a high-quality, resourceful AI UI Engineer to build and maintain executive-level AI demonstrations and proofs of value. The primary mission of this innovation-focused team is to rapidly prototype concepts into polished, digestible demo experiences that vividly showcase how customers utilize ServiceNow products. This is a demo-first, highly dynamic engineering role rather than a traditional platform development position.

DAY-TO-DAY RESPONSIBILITIES
Build and maintain interactive AI-powered demos and POCs tailored for executive and customer audiences.

Develop crisp front-end experiences using modern JavaScript, with an emphasis on Lit.js frameworks.

Implement full-stack web solutions that directly integrate advanced agentic AI and GenAI capabilities.

Rapidly prototype "happy path" demo flows designed to explicitly communicate strategic business value.

Continuously maintain and iterate on demo quality over time to ensure reusable, sustained product presentations.

Collaborate closely with a lean, highly innovative team while documenting demo layouts for seamless handoffs.


TOP 3 REQUIRED SKILLS

JavaScript (Expert / P4): 5+ years of experience (Lit.js experience highly preferred).

React.js & Front End Development: 5+ years of experience with comprehensive UI architecture.

GenAI / Agentic AI Integration: 1+ years of experience building prompt-driven workflows, LLM interfaces, or widget-based AI experiences.


ADDITIONAL DESIRED SKILLS

CSS3 & HTML5

Node.js (Full Stack capabilities)

Prior ServiceNow development/ecosystem experience

Executive, sales demo, or Innovation Lab project experience


IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE
The ideal candidate is a "scrappy", production-grade Full Stack/UI Engineer who possesses strong front-end visual instincts and thrives in high-velocity prototyping environments. They should be comfortable turning ambiguous ideas into clear, executive-ready experiences, shifting away from heavy platform architectural constraints in favor of rapid, meaningful feature presentation. A background in engineering or an equivalent technical field with clear documentation habits fits this team culture perfectly.
 

Best Regards,

Anand Singh

| IT Recruiter | TEK Inspirations LLC |
W: (469) 638-7409
mailto:anand.singh@tekinspirations.com

Hi Shuzi,

I'm excited that you are interested in being submitted for the Software Dev Engineer III position that we spoke about. I think you're a great fit. Here are the specifics of the position that we discussed:

Client: Amazon
Job Requisition ID: 165311-1
Title: Software Dev Engineer III
Location: Seattle, WA
Pay Rate:  $ 75 /hr on W2
Upcoming Vacation/Holidays (Next 3 Months): None planned/Yes (specify dates):


 *   Consent (RTR) Form<https://www2.jobdiva.com/candidates/unreg/signPDF.jsp?role=0&roleid=19646378485902&id=19646378485902&recruiterid=1621220&rfqid=28215861&docid=0&filecode=01kb5P7CR&isencoded=1&docname=012ZxEMRAEAeQo8XHsAcxZiAj9dGRw1Pw%3D%3D&enccode=031FRJbABRZSlYEAAdYESd0PQYWEl5QXRJORF9ABBYpLAAcQBMSAFpWVEwSFllTXVkDAQ%3D%3D&companyName=Akraya%2C+Inc.&a=msjdnwfiqhhu3srzaivi48a71oqv4k03a749qsxviaaqo5fa4ha7svx91dsxvd1b&t=1779832672011&>


For us to move forward with your submission, you will need to:

 1.  Reply "Agreed" to this email confirming the rate above and the data collection policy below.
 2.  Complete the Consent (RTR) form linked above. This is a standard form required by Amazon that confirms you have not been submitted yet for job #165311-1. Please note that Akraya will not be able to submit you to Amazon without this consent.
Please be advised that once you have agreed on a rate, there will be little to no room for further negotiation.
Also, here is a copy of the job description for your reference.
Thank you and I look forward to working with you. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions.

Job Description:
Primary Skills: React (Expert), Java (Expert), Micro Frontend (Expert), APIs (Expert), Cloud Architecture (Proficient)
Contract Type:  W2
Duration:  6+ month with possible extension
Location: Seattle, WA
Pay Range: $70 - 74.50 per Hour on W2

Job Summary:
We are seeking a skilled Senior Software Development Engineer to join a team focused on modernizing demand planning systems. This role involves developing and enhancing front-end applications and APIs within an AWS environment. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in JavaScript frameworks and cloud services.
Key Responsibilities:

 *   Develop and maintain user-facing features using React and related technologies.
 *   Build and integrate robust APIs to support system functionality.
 *   Contribute to the design and implementation of micro front-end architecture.
 *   Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver innovative solutions.
 *   Ensure high standards of code quality and system performance.
Must-Have Skills:

 *   Expert proficiency in React, Java, and API development.
 *   Experience with micro front-end architecture.
 *   Strong understanding of AWS services.
Industry Experience:
Experience in supply chain or demand planning is beneficial for this role.

subject:
Urgent Hiring on W2 // AI Engineer (Backend/TypeScript or Python) @
 Austin, TX/Sunnyvale, CA (Hybrid from day 1)
body:
Greetings,

Hope you are doing great!!



My name is Tushar Saini, and I am an Sr. Technical Recruiter at Sibitalent Corp.

I am reaching out to you on an exciting job opportunity with one of our clients



Job Description



Job Position: AI Engineer (Backend/TypeScript or Python)

Job Type: W2

Location: Austin, TX/Sunnyvale, CA (Hybrid from day 1)

Duration: 6+ months contract

Client: Apple



AI Engineer (Backend TypeScript or Python)

  *   Strong backend engineering in TypeScript/Node.js (preferred) or Python, with production API design experience
  *   Has built LLM harnesses/scaffolds with agentic loops, RAG pipelines, and tool-calling architectures
  *   Experience designing multi-agent systems and integrating LLMs with internal/external APIs
  *   Bonus: AI platform/developer tooling, evaluation & observability frameworks, AI security & guardrails



Additional Info:

  *   Experience building AI-powered features into production web applications.
  *   Ability to design and implement:
     *   Context-aware chat interfaces
     *   RAG-based systems
     *   Enterprise integrations
  *   Comfortable operating in:
     *   TypeScript-heavy environments (preferred)
     *   Python environments with willingness to adopt TypeScript



Additional expectations:

  *   Strong use of Claude and AI-assisted development workflows.
  *   Skilled at:
     *   Prompting
     *   Structuring tasks
     *   Reviewing and validating generated code



Thanks & Regards



Tushar Saini

Sr. Technical Recruiter

Mob: +1 (972)736-8316 | E-Mail: tsaini@sibitalent.com<mailto:tsaini@sibitalent.com> | LinkedIn<https://www.linkedin.com/in/tsn25/>

[SIBI LOGO]

Website: www.sibitalent.com<http://www.sibitalent.com/>

101 E. Park Blvd., Suite 600, Plano, TX - 75074



Note: "SibiTalent Corp. is an equal opportunity staffing firm. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, caste, color, religion, gender, culture, visa status, or any other protected characteristic.

All hiring decisions are made strictly based on qualifications, experience, and specific client requirements."

subject:
Contract job with Apple via Scalence for a Full Stack Developer in
 Culver City
body:
Hi



Hope you are doing well !!!



My name is Nitish and I'm a recruiter at Scalence owned by Artech, a global staffing and IT consulting company. We are constantly on the lookout for professionals to fulfill the staffing needs of our clients, and we currently have a job opening that may interest you. Below is a summary of the position.



If you are currently not in the job seeking market, feel free to refer this position to someone you may know to be a fit. However, should this position be of interest to you, please send me your resume or contact me directly at 973.967.3381



Job Title: Full Stack Developer

Location: Culver City, CA (Hybrid)

Duration: 12+ months

Client: Apple

Pay: $60/hr on W2



Full-Stack Engineer - Media Operations (70% Frontend / 30% Java)

  *   We are looking for a Frontend-heavy Full-Stack Engineer to build the mission-critical interfaces and orchestration tools that power Client Original Content. In this role, you will bridge the gap between massive media datasets and the studio teams who
manage them.
  *   You'll work alongside senior engineers and architects, contributing deep implementation expertise while taking ownership of the code you ship.
  *   We are not looking for "task-doers" who simply check off tickets.
  *   We need analytical thinkers who go above and beyond to understand the "why" behind the system, proactively identifying bottlenecks in the media pipeline before they become outages.

Key Responsibilities

  *   Advanced UI Orchestration: Build sophisticated, state-heavy applications using React and TypeScript. You will build interfaces that manage catalogs, availability windows, and technical specifications for content across Sports, TV, and Music.
  *   Systems & Data Integration: Maintain and extend a robust Java backend, working within established architectural patterns. You will manage data persistence across PostgreSQL for relational metadata and NoSQL solutions for high-throughput logging and asset state tracking.
  *   AI-Augmented Development: Leverage Generative AI to reduce developer toil and amplify focus on complex problems. We expect engineers who use AI to generate documentation, build comprehensive test coverage, and
understand intricate architectures - freeing up time to tackle the challenging problems that truly require human insight.
  *   Analytical Problem Solving: Analyze complex content assembly pipelines. You are expected to dive deep into the "plumbing," using data to inform implementation decisions, recommend improvements, and contribute to the 99.99%
reliability of our media egress.

Tech Stack

  *   React & TypeScript: This is the primary driver for "Advanced UI Orchestration." You'll need deep knowledge of state management (Redux, Recoil, or React Query) to handle complex, real-time media metadata.
  *   Java & Spring Boot: For the 30% backend, you need a firm grasp of the JVM ecosystem to maintain robust microservices that handle content availability and asset state tracking.
  *   PostgreSQL & NoSQL (e.g., Cassandra or MongoDB): You must be comfortable with dual-database strategies—using SQL for relational content metadata (catalogs) and NoSQL for high-throughput logging and asset status.
  *   Distributed Systems / Orchestration: Since the role involves "media egress" and "content assembly pipelines," familiarity with tools like Kafka (for event streaming) or Airflow/Temporal (for workflow orchestration) is vital.
  *   GenAI Tooling (Prompt Engineering/LLMs): The role explicitly asks for "AI-Augmented Development." You need proficiency in using tools like GitHub Copilot or LLM APIs to automate boilerplate, testing, and documentation.

The Ideal Candidate Profile

  *   We are looking for a Systems-Thinking Product Engineer. This person isn't just a UI developer; they are an engineer who understands how a button click on the frontend triggers a cascade of events across a global media pipeline.
  *   The "Why" Specialist: They don't just fix a bug; they find out why the bug existed in the pipeline architecture and suggest a systemic fix.
  *   Media-Savvy: Ideally, they understand the nuances of digital assets—things like "availability windows," "codecs," or "DRM," or at least have the curiosity to learn the domain deeply.
  *   High-Reliability Mindset: They treat 99.99% uptime as a personal challenge. They value automated testing and observability (telemetry) over "move fast and break things.

Nitish Bose
Lead Recruiter
[cid:image001.png@01DCE83C.9447AF80]
Cell: 973.967.3381

Website: www.scalence.com<http://www.scalence.com/>

subject: JD: Next.JS Developer (Kforce)
body:
From: Sujal Baghel <sujal@tekinspirations.com> 
Sent: 15 May 2026 12:18
To: 'feiranwang0502@gmail.com' <feiranwang0502@gmail.com>
Cc: 'sumit.singh' <sumit.singh@tekinspirations.com>;
'jade@pilottechnologies.net' <jade@pilottechnologies.net>
Subject: JD: Next.JS Developer (Kforce)

 

Job Description -

Next.JS Developer (Kforce)

Onsite in Madison, WI, US (Need Local Candidates)

USC, H4EAD, GCEAD

Need Genuine Visa


Need old LinkedIn with Strong connection

For our corporate websites, we use Sitecore as a centralized content
management system (CMS), with Vercel as our frontend hosting platform. We're
seeking two Senior Frontend Engineers (contract) to build and enhance
Sitecore frontend components developed in Next.js and deployed on Vercel.

Responsibilities:
* Develop, maintain, and optimize reusable frontend components integrated
with Sitecore
* Collaborate with designers and product partners to translate requirements
into high-quality user experiences
* Integrate with APIs and support related automation/scripting as needed
* Participate in Agile ceremonies and work management in Jira

REQUIREMENTS:
* To be considered for this position, candidates must have experience in a
similar role, or they must possess significant knowledge, experience, and
abilities to successfully perform the responsibilities listed
* Relevant education and/or training will be considered a plus
* Strong frontend engineering experience with Next.js (or React)
* Solid proficiency with HTML/CSS (modern, responsive UI development)

Preferred:
* Familiarity with Sitecore, ideally Sitecore 10.x
* Experience with API integrations
* Experience with PowerShell scripting/automation
* Comfort working with design specs in Figma (and/or similar tools)
* Experience working in Jira and Agile delivery environments
 

 

 

Regards,

Sujal Baghel

Technical Recruiter  (Java/UI)

TEK Inspirations LLC | 13573 Tabasco Cat Trail, Frisco, TX 75035

subject:
[Compliance] Action required: Update your work authorization
 details
body:
Dear All,



You are receiving this email because your current employer is listed as Pilot Technologies, and our records indicate one of the following:

Your work authorization information is missing or incomplete


Your work authorization expiration date is missing


Your work authorization expiration date is within the next 2 months





Please log in to the employee portal and review/update your information as soon as possible (also to avoid further annoying notifications :-):



https://www.pilottechnologies.net/?utm_source=chatgpt.com#/employee/employee-profile 



Required actions:

Verify that your work authorization information and expiration date are correct and update if needed.


If Pilot Technologies is no longer your current employer, please update the dropdown selection to “No”





If you are currently in the process of renewing your work authorization, please treat this email as a reminder until your updated document has been submitted.





Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Pilot Technologies HR Team

subject: You have a new Randstad Digital job opportunity to review!
body:
You've been matched to a job opportunity on Randstad Digital Torc.

We’re so glad you’re here. Seriously — thanks for joining us and congrats on your job oppportunity!

Randstad Digital Torc is all about helping talent like you connect with great opportunities, build community, and feel supported every step of the way. This isn’t just another platform — it’s a space we’re building together, and it means a lot to have you with us.

So what now?

Well first of all, you already have been matched by a recruiter to a new job opportunity!

* Sign up on the Torc platform at https://platform.torc.dev/#/signup ( https://platform.torc.dev/#/signup ) with this email address.
* Once you are logged in, view your jobs to see your first matched opportunity!
* Join our Discord — it’s where all the fun happens. You’ll find updates, job tips, and an awesome crew of builders just like you.
* Share Torc with a few friends you think would love it too.
We can’t wait to see what you bring to the table. Let’s build something incredible... together.

The Randstad Digital Torc Team

Unsubscribe ( <%asm_group_unsubscribe_raw_url%> ) - Unsubscribe Preferences ( <%asm_preferences_raw_url%> )

subject: RTR: Software Developer- 100% Interview
body:
Hi Shuzi Gong,

As discussed, I am moving ahead with your profile and you will receive a call/Email from “Nick Averna ”.

Please make sure that you represent “Rishu Upadhyay” (A/C Manager) from “TEK Inspirations LLC” is your Employer and representative “Nitin Tehriya” for the below requirement. Please acknowledge this email that you received it.



Job Description -

Need Genuine Visa - prefer local fits 

Software Developer

Location - Hybrid in Fremont, CA 

Duration - 4 Month Extendable Contract

IMPORTANT - Local or relocation candidates will be considered but candidates need to commit to being onsite for Day 1.

Required Skills:

  • ·  Experience with ElectronJS

  • ·  Strong React / JavaScript / TypeScript

  • ·  Experience with HTML, CSS, Tailwind

  • ·  Familiarity with Redux or React Context

  • ·  Backend development with Node.js and/or Python

  • ·  Experience building REST APIs using Express.js

  • ·  Database experience (MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB)

  • ·  Experience with code reviews, Git branch management, and SDLC

Key Responsibilities:

  • Develop desktop and web applications using ElectronJS and modern JavaScript frameworks

  • Build responsive UI components using React

  • Develop and maintain RESTful APIs

  • Work with SQL and NoSQL databases

  • Participate in code reviews and collaborative development



Regards,

Rishu Upadhyay

Lead Business Development Manager

TEK Inspirations LLC | 13573 Tabasco Cat Trail, Frisco, TX 75035

Desk # 4696491802 | E: rishu.upadhyay@tekinspirations.com

Hangout : rishu.upadhyay1707@gmail.com

Thank you,

Regards

Rishu Upadhyay

On Apr 10, 2026, at 3:51 PM, Shuzi Gong <galiana18@yahoo.com> wrote:

﻿
Dear Ashley, 

I hope you are doing well.

I am writing to inquire about potential openings at Walmart that involve React and GraphQL technologies. I am a Full-Stack MERN Developer with over 7 years of experience designing, developing, and deploying high-performance web applications.

My expertise lies in building scalable, maintainable, and secure web solutions using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js). I have a strong background in modern frontend development with React, as well as experience integrating GraphQL APIs to optimize data fetching and improve application performance.

I have attached my resume for your review and would greatly appreciate the opportunity to discuss how my background and skills could contribute to your team.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you.


Best,
Nina

On Thursday, March 12, 2026 at 02:11:03 PM PDT, Neha Chahar <neha.chahar@adventatech.com <mailto:neha.chahar@adventatech.com> > wrote: 

 

 

Hi Shuzi Gong,

As discussed, I am moving ahead with your profile and you will receive a call/Email from “ Patrick Catagnus”.

Please make sure that you represent “Neha Chahar” (A/C Manager) from “Adventa Tech Inc” is your Employer and representative “Nitin Tehriya” for the below requirement. Please acknowledge this email that you received it. 

 

Job Description -

MERN Developer
(Kforce)

Philadelphia, PA Remote but Need Local for meetings

Client- Concord

Linkedin

Only geniune Visa No fake Visa. 

 

Responsibilities:
* Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) in an agile environment
* Build and maintain front-end components and reusable libraries using React.js
* Develop and support backend services and RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express
* Translate UI/UX designs and wireframes into high-quality, efficient, and maintainable code
* Optimize applications for performance, scalability, responsiveness, and cross-browser compatibility
* Monitor, debug, and enhance application functionality and performance across the full stack
* Maintain, expand, and scale existing applications to support business growth
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams while also working independently to meet project deadlines
* Create and maintain clear technical and software documentation

REQUIREMENTS:
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field, or equivalent practical experience
* Strong proficiency in JavaScript, HTML, and CSS
* 5+ years of front-end development experience using React.js and Redux
* 3+ years of experience working with Node.js and the npm ecosystem in a production environment
* Hands-on experience with MongoDB and RESTful APIs
* Practical knowledge of debugging, monitoring, and improving Node.js and Express applications
* Ability to design clean, scalable, and high-performance code architecture
* Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to work independently and collaboratively
* Effective communication skills, including the ability to document technical concepts clearly

 

 

 

Neha Chahar

Business Development Executive

Adventa Tech Inc.

24718 Tribe Square #306, Dulles, VA 20166, US

Call at: 5716852646

E-Mail: Neha.Chahar@adventatech.com <mailto:Neha.Chahar@adventatech.com> 

Website: www.adventatech.com <http://www.adventatech.com/> 

Thank you,

Regards

subject: Senior Frontend Engineer (React/TypeScript)
body:
Job Description -

****PV-W2****
Title: Senior Frontend Engineer (React/TypeScript)
Hybrid, Dearborn, MI
Need LinkedIn along with the profile picture
Candidate should have very good communications skills

**********Basic Rejection Reason By PV********
Candidate does not demonstrate strong recent hands-on experience with core
technologies (React and TypeScript) required for the role.
Tailwind CSS experience is missing or not clearly shown in project work.
Some key skills appear outdated or not used in the last 5 years.
Required technologies are only listed in the skills/environment section
without clear implementation in work experience.
Limited evidence of building modern UI components and integrating RESTful
APIs within recent projects.
Overall technical alignment with the required frontend stack (React,
TypeScript, Tailwind, Node ecosystem) is insufficient for client submission.

 

Top Requirements: 

1. Bachelor Degree is REQUIRED. 10+ years in IT; 8+ years in development.

2. Strong experience with React and TypeScript

3. Proficiency in modern JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3

4. Experience with Tailwind CSS

5. Working knowledge of Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL

6. Experience using Docker in development workflows

7. Familiarity with RESTful APIs and Git-based version control

 

Position Description:

Develop and maintain the front-end/ client-side of an application, typically
a web application, but sometimes also a mobile application or
mobile-friendly responsive application and are responsible for the design
and implementation of the user interface and user experience. 

 

Key Responsibilities: 

1. Engage with customers to deeply understand their use-cases, pain points,
and requirements, showcasing empathy and advocating for user-centric
software solutions 

2. Solve complex problems by designing, developing, and delivering using
various tools, languages, frameworks, and technologies 

3. Align with architecture guidelines for unified and coherent approach to
development 

4. Collaborate with cross functional teams like product owners, designers,
back-end developers, architects etc.

5. Create mock-ups and prototypes to visualize new features and participate
in user interface design reviews and product demos 

6. Performs functional automated testing and UI testing to ensure quality
development 

7. Work on continuously improving performance by fixing bugs and optimizing
the application and implement new technologies to maximize development
efficiency 

8. Familiar with programming practices, such as cross-browser compatibility
testing, SEO principles and accessibility standards 

9. Design, develop, and deliver user friendly interactive experience using
enterprise brand standards and templates for a consistent user experience
using languages like HTML, CSS, JavaScript or more advanced frameworks like
React and Angular 

10. Keep up to date with latest emerging technologies and trends in user
interface design

 

. Design and implement responsive, user-friendly web interfaces using React
and TypeScript 

. Build reusable, well-structured UI components with Tailwind CSS 

. Collaborate with back-end developers to integrate APIs built with Node.js
and Express 

. Consume and manage data from PostgreSQL databases via RESTful APIs 

. Ensure cross-browser compatibility, accessibility, and performance
optimization 

. Participate in code reviews and frontend architecture decisions 

. Work within containerized environments using Docker 

. Troubleshoot and resolve UI and integration issues


Skills Required:

React, HTML5, JavaScript Integrated RESTful API's into applications ensuring
functionality and performance met client specifications 

Utilized GitHub for source code management Developed and optimized React
based applications improving user experience across multiple platforms
Developed static and dynamic websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

Required Qualifications 

. Strong experience with React and TypeScript 

. Proficiency in modern JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3 

. Experience with Tailwind CSS 

. Working knowledge of Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL 

. Experience using Docker in development workflows 

. Familiarity with RESTful APIs and Git-based version control

 

Regards,

Nitin Tehriya

Technical Recruiter  ( JAVA , FRONTEND , AEM , UI/UX , GOLANG SPECIALIST )

TEK Inspirations LLC | 13573 Tabasco Cat Trail, Frisco, TX 75035

Desk # 469-844-4751| E:  <mailto:Nitin.tehriya@tekinspirations.com>
Nitin.tehriya@tekinspirations.com 

Hangouts:  <mailto:nitintehriya@gmail.com> nitintehriya@gmail.com

subject: Job Submittal Confirmation/Right to Represent
body:
Hi Nina,

Thank you for your time. I have included the information about the position we discussed with Apple, Inc below. Please review and let me know if you have any questions. Per our conversation, you have given me permission to submit you to Apple, Inc for the Front End Engineer position, 26-155549 at a rate of $45.00 / Hourly. To the best of your knowledge, you have not been submitted to this role previously, nor have you interviewed with Apple, Inc for this position.

Please reply to this e-mail and confirm these submission details.

  Frontend Engineer  Locations: 3x per week onsite in: San Diego, CA or Culver City, CA or Cupertino, CA      About this Featured Opportunity:     As a Frontend Engineer, you take on sophisticated problems while enjoying working in an Agile team that continually delights and surprises our users. You collaborate daily with designers, backend engineers, leads and product managers and play an active role in the future roadmap of our web applications. You have proven verbal and written communication skills with the ability to clearly communicate complex technical information to both technical and non-technical audiences. You will need to audit new and existing internal and external solutions, work with teams throughout the entire lifecycle of a project on new features and solutions, liaise and coordinate with various functions, and always represent the team positively and effectively. You will be a pragmatic and trustworthy individual, able to promote the best results whilst also nurturing positive relationships with all those you work with.        The Opportunity for You:    We are looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer who has a passion for design and can build beautiful and scalable web applications using modern web technologies. This role will be primarily building a brand-new scalable web application and migrating existing code base from the current application.         Key Success Factors:       5  years of experience in a professional programming position with experience developing   user-focused web applications.       Must be excellent at refactoring code with care, minimizing bugs and regressions.           Professional experience with at least one of the modern Web UI frameworks:   Svelte   (preferred)   or   React.     Strong foundations and proficiency in modern web development using   HTML,   CSS, and   JavaScript     Experience using Git in a professional/workplace environment.            Nice to Haves:       Large project experience with a track record of driving significant positive changes inside large mission-critical code bases.     A good UI design sense and great collaboration and communication skills.         About INSPYR Solutions      Technology is our focus and quality is our commitment. As a national expert in delivering flexible technology and talent solutions, we strategically align industry and technical expertise with our clients' business objectives and cultural needs. Our solutions are tailored to each client and include a wide variety of professional services, project, and talent solutions. By always striving for excellence and focusing on the human aspect of our business, we work seamlessly with our talent and clients to match the right solutions to the right opportunities. Learn more about us at inspyrsolutions.com.           INSPYR Solutions provides Equal Employment Opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, or genetics. In addition to federal law requirements, INSPYR Solutions complies with applicable state and local laws governing nondiscrimination in employment in every location in which the company has facilities.       

Thanks again, Nina, and I look forward to working with you.

Respectfully,
Cole Lirio

Job Description -

MERN Developer
(Kforce)

Philadelphia, PA Remote but Need Local for meetings

Client- Concord

Linkedin

Only geniune Visa No fake Visa. 

 

Responsibilities:
* Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) in an agile environment
* Build and maintain front-end components and reusable libraries using React.js
* Develop and support backend services and RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express
* Translate UI/UX designs and wireframes into high-quality, efficient, and maintainable code
* Optimize applications for performance, scalability, responsiveness, and cross-browser compatibility
* Monitor, debug, and enhance application functionality and performance across the full stack

* Collaborate with cross-functional teams while also working independently to meet project deadlines

* 3+ years of experience working with Node.js and the npm ecosystem in a production environment
* Hands-on experience with MongoDB and RESTful APIs
* Practical knowledge of debugging, monitoring, and improving Node.js and Express applications
* Ability to design clean, scalable, and high-performance code architecture
* Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to work independently and collaboratively
* Effective communication skills, including the ability to document technical concepts clearly

subject: Software Developer (Full-Stack) PV W2
body:
Job Description -

 

Job Title  : Software Developer (Full-Stack) PV W2

Location  : Fremont, CA - Hybrid (3 Days Onsite / 2 Days Remote) 

Duration  : 4 + Months

Job Type  : Onsite

Interview : Skype

Need Local Candidate + dl

Need LinkedIn 

NEED BEST PROFILE

 

 

Overview

 

casting a line for a Software Developer to support an innovative software
automation team in Fremont, CA.

 

This role will contribute to an existing development initiative focused on
automating large technical reporting systems for wireless testing
environments. The architecture has already been established; the goal now is
to scale and enhance the automation platform to generate dozens of complex
reports.

 

This opportunity is ideal for a hands-on developer who enjoys solving
complex technical problems, building scalable solutions, and contributing to
full-stack development efforts within a collaborative engineering team.

 

What You Will Do

 

The Software Developer will support the expansion of an automated reporting
platform responsible for generating detailed technical reports used in
wireless/FCC testing.

 

Key responsibilities include:

 

*	Develop and enhance automation processes that generate large
technical reports (200-400 pages)
*	Build functionality to populate tables, charts, graphs, and
structured data automatically
*	Work with HTML templates and structured data sources
*	Pull data from network locations and integrate it into automated
reporting outputs
*	Collaborate with RF Engineers and Senior Developers
*	Contribute to ongoing improvements to the automation platform and
supporting tools
*	Participate in code reviews, branch management, and SDLC processes

 

Required Technical Skills

 

Primary skills the hiring manager is prioritizing:

 

*	JavaScript
*	TypeScript
*	HTML
*	Full-Stack Development Experience

 

Additional required experience:

 

*	Experience working within the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC)
*	Experience with version control and code collaboration (Git /
GitHub)
*	Ability to break down complex problems and execute technical
solutions

 

Frontend Technologies

HTML

CSS

CSS frameworks (Tailwind CSS preferred)

JavaScript / TypeScript

React.js or similar frontend libraries

UI frameworks such as Ant Design (antd) or shadcn

State management tools such as Redux or React Context

 

Backend Technologies

 

*	Node.js
*	Python
*	RESTful API development
*	Server frameworks such as Express.js
*	SQL and NoSQL databases (SQLite, MySQL, MongoDB)

 

Nice to Have

 

*	Electron.js
*	Experience with automation frameworks
*	Familiarity with AI coding tools (GitHub Copilot or similar)
*	Development Environment

 

Tools used by the team include:

 

*	Microsoft Visual Studio
*	Azure DevOps
*	GitHub repositories
*	GitHub Copilot and internal AI coding tools

 

Ideal Candidate Profile

 

The ideal candidate is a mid-to-senior level developer (3-5+ years
experience) who:

 

Is comfortable joining an existing project and scaling it

Has strong JavaScript, TypeScript, and HTML development experience

Enjoys solving complex automation and data integration challenges

Works well in a collaborative engineering team environment

Regards,

Nitin Tehriya

Technical Recruiter  ( JAVA , FRONTEND , AEM , UI/UX , GOLANG SPECIALIST )

body:
WebEx Link: https://appleinc.webex.com/appleinc/j.php?MTID=m9697c50f727469c93a73bc36f20e66e7

Time: 11:00am  11:45am PST
Interviewer: Nikhil Lele
Prep: React coding!




About this Featured Opportunity:
As a Frontend Engineer, you take on sophisticated problems while enjoying working in an Agile team that continually delights and surprises our users. You collaborate daily with designers, backend engineers, leads and product managers and play an active role in the future roadmap of our web applications. You have proven verbal and written communication skills with the ability to clearly communicate complex technical information to both technical and non-technical audiences. You will need to audit new and existing internal and external solutions, work with teams throughout the entire lifecycle of a project on new features and solutions, liaise and coordinate with various functions, and always represent the team positively and effectively. You will be a pragmatic and trustworthy individual, able to promote the best results whilst also nurturing positive relationships with all those you work with.

The Opportunity for You:
We are looking for a  Frontend Engineer who has a passion for design and can build beautiful and scalable web applications using modern web technologies. This role will be primarily building a brand-new scalable web application and migrating existing code base from the current application.

Key Success Factors:

  *
3+ years of experience in a professional programming position with experience developing user-focused web applications.
     *   Must be excellent at refactoring code with care, minimizing bugs and regressions.
  *   Professional experience with at least one of the modern Web UI frameworks: Svelte (preferred) or React.
  *   Strong foundations and proficiency in modern web development using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
  *   Experience using Git in a professional/workplace environment.

Nice to Haves:

  *   Large project experience with a track record of driving significant positive changes inside large mission-critical code bases.
  *   A good UI design sense and great collaboration and communication skills.

subject: React Developer
body:
Job Description -

( PV W2 )

Title: React Developer 
Location: Columbus, OH / New York, NY (onsite)
Duration: 6-12+ Months Contract to Hire
Client JPMC 

Job Responsibilities:

MUST HAVE skills 

Interview Process

*	1st Round: Zoom Interview
*	2nd / Final Round: Onsite for Local or Zoom Interview

Job Description:

*	Proficient in UI application development skills as well as multiple
design techniques
*	Working proficiency in UI development toolset to design, develop,
test, deploy, maintain and improve software
*	Strong understanding of Agile methodologies with ability to work in
at least one of the common frameworks
*	Strong understanding of techniques such as Continuous Integration,
Continuous Delivery, Test Driven Development, Cloud Development, application
resiliency and security
*	Proficiency in one or more general purpose programming languages
*	Working proficiency in a portion of software engineering disciplines
and demonstrates understanding of overall software skills including business
analysis, development, testing, deployment, maintenance and improvement of
software

Must have:

*	Min 2 to 3 years of experience React, Typescript, React Context API,
React query, Jest, React testing library, Cypress, API integration
libraries, CICD, Code quality testing, Integration & rollout support

Roles and Responsibility:

*	Apply expertise in UI development to design, build, test, deploy,
maintain, and enhance web applications.
*	Demonstrate a solid grasp of Agile practices and effectively operate
within at least one widely-used Agile framework.
*	Possess strong knowledge of modern development techniques, including
Continuous Integration, Continuous Delivery, and Test Driven Development.
*	Exhibit proficiency in key software engineering areas and a
comprehensive understanding of the software lifecycle, encompassing business
analysis, development, testing, deployment, maintenance, and ongoing
improvement.

Note:

*	5 days onsite

 

Regards,

subject: Re: Interview Request from Walmart
body:
Good morning Nina,

Here is the JD for the role:

*What You’ll Do*

   -

   *Architect & Develop:* Design and maintain scalable, high-performance
   microservices using *Node.js* and *TypeScript*.
   -

   *GraphQL Federation:* Implement and manage *Apollo Federation* to unify
   various backend services into a single, performant data graph.
   -

   *Schema Design:* Collaborate with frontend and backend teams to define
   robust GraphQL schemas and resolvers that minimize over-fetching.
   -

   *Performance Optimization:* Troubleshoot and optimize latency in
   distributed systems, leveraging caching strategies (Redis) and CDN
   integration.
   -

   *Cloud Native:* Deploy and manage services in cloud-native environments
   (Azure/GCP) using *Docker* and *Kubernetes*.
   -

   *Operational Excellence:* Own the full SDLC, including CI/CD pipeline
   automation, observability (Prometheus/Grafana), and "Shift Left" testing
   practices.

*What You’ll Bring*

   -

   *Experience:* 3–8+ years of professional software engineering experience
   (depending on level).
   -

   *Technical Core:* Deep proficiency in *Node.js* (Async/Await, Event
   Loop) and *GraphQL* (Apollo Server/Client).
   -

   *Backend Mastery:* Strong understanding of microservices architecture,
   RESTful APIs, and event-driven systems (Kafka).
   -

   *Database Knowledge:* Proficiency with SQL (PostgreSQL/Azure SQL) and
   NoSQL (Cosmos DB/Cassandra).

  • Experience with ElectronJS

subject: Nina Gong- Frontend Engineer
body:
About this Featured Opportunity:
As a Frontend Engineer, you take on sophisticated problems while enjoying working in an Agile team that continually delights and surprises our users. You collaborate daily with designers, backend engineers, leads and product managers and play an active role in the future roadmap of our web applications. You have proven verbal and written communication skills with the ability to clearly communicate complex technical information to both technical and non-technical audiences. You will need to audit new and existing internal and external solutions, work with teams throughout the entire lifecycle of a project on new features and solutions, liaise and coordinate with various functions, and always represent the team positively and effectively. You will be a pragmatic and trustworthy individual, able to promote the best results whilst also nurturing positive relationships with all those you work with.

The Opportunity for You:
We are looking for a  Frontend Engineer who has a passion for design and can build beautiful and scalable web applications using modern web technologies. This role will be primarily building a brand-new scalable web application and migrating existing code base from the current application.

Key Success Factors:

  *
3+ years of experience in a professional programming position with experience developing user-focused web applications.
     *   Must be excellent at refactoring code with care, minimizing bugs and regressions.
  *   Professional experience with at least one of the modern Web UI frameworks: Svelte (preferred) or React.
  *   Strong foundations and proficiency in modern web development using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
  *   Experience using Git in a professional/workplace environment.

Nice to Haves:

  *   Large project experience with a track record of driving significant positive changes inside large mission-critical code bases.
  *   A good UI design sense and great collaboration and communication skills.

  *   Large project experience with a track record of driving significant positive changes inside large mission-critical code bases.
  *   A good UI design sense and great collaboration and communication skills.

subject: Job Submittal Confirmation/Right to Represent
body:
Hi Nina, 

Thank you for your time. I have included the information about the position we discussed with Apple, Inc below. Please review and let me know if you have any questions. Per our conversation, you have given me permission to submit you to Apple, Inc for the UI Engineer (React) position, 26-00882 at a rate of $57.00 / Hourly.  To the best of your knowledge, you have not been submitted to this role previously, nor have you interviewed with Apple, Inc for this position. 

Please reply to this e-mail and confirm these submission details. 

   React Engineer    Location: Austin, TX or SCV       BOUT THIS FEATURED OPPORTUNITY  We are seeking a highly skilled  UI Engineer (React) to build a management reporting dashboard from the ground up. This dashboard will deliver nuanced reporting to executive leadership and surface highly sensitive finance data.  This is an individual contributor role where you will partner cross-functionally with engineering, product, and finance teams to design and develop a scalable, secure, and high-performance reporting experience.    THE OPPORTUNITY FOR YOU  You will own the end-to-end UI development of a mission-critical executive dashboard. From architecture decisions to component design and performance optimization, you'll play a key role in shaping a polished, data-driven user experience.  You'll collaborate closely with backend engineers and stakeholders to ensure accurate data representation, intuitive workflows, and secure handling of finance-sensitive information. This is an opportunity to build something impactful from scratch with visibility at the executive level.   1. Strong React Expertise (5–7 Years)       Deep experience building production-grade React applications       Advanced knowledge of React Hooks, component lifecycle, performance optimization, and memoization       Proven experience building  UI dashboards from scratch       2. State Management & API Integration       Hands-on experience with Redux and API state management       Strong understanding of asynchronous data handling and scalable front-end architecture      3. Core Front-End Foundations & Testing       Strong proficiency in JavaScript (ES6  preferred), HTML, and CSS       Experience with modern CSS frameworks Open to any of those (Tailwind, Styled Components, CSS Modules, Sass, etc.)        Material UI  needed for web components       Experience with testing frameworks Open to any (EX: Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress, or similar)     NICE TO HAVES      TypeScript experience       Experience working with executive-level reporting or finance data          About INSPYR Solutions   Technology is our focus and quality is our commitment. As a national expert in delivering flexible technology and talent solutions, we strategically align industry and technical expertise with our clients' business objectives and cultural needs. Our solutions are tailored to each client and include a wide variety of professional services, project, and talent solutions. By always striving for excellence and focusing on the human aspect of our business, we work seamlessly with our talent and clients to match the right solutions to the right opportunities. Learn more about us at inspyrsolutions.com.      INSPYR Solutions provides Equal Employment Opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, or genetics. In addition to federal law requirements, INSPYR Solutions complies with applicable state and local laws governing nondiscrimination in employment in every location in which the company has facilities.    

Thanks again, Nina, and I look forward to working with you. 

Respectfully, 
Cole Lirio

subject: Hiring now - Work from anywhere
body:
Hi Wendy,

I’m working on a great remote role and wanted to share the opportunity with you: Remote Forward Deployed Engineer - $160-$190k (Robo Fleet Mgmt)

If you're interested, you can apply through the link or reply with your resume to start the conversation.

If this job isn’t quite what you’re looking for, I might need a more updated version of your resume. Please upload your most recent resume so we can send you opportunities more aligned with your skills and experience. 

Thanks,
Matt
 
Matt Abbasfard
Lead Recruiter
Phone: 949.381.7444
View my open jobs
       
   


JobID: MA5-1974839

Permanently 100% Remote (Must be Located in AZ, CA, CO, IL, KS, MA, NY, NC, OK, OR, PA, or WA)
Job Title: Remote Forward Deployed Engineer - $160-$190k (Robo Fleet Mgmt)
Salary: $160k-$190k + Benefits, 401k, PTO, Equity
Requirements: Enterprise + Technical Experience, Python, AI/LLMs are a big plus!

We offer an intuitive, cloud-based platform for robotic fleet management.

Our product allows our clients to operate, view, and manage robots from anywhere in the word. We also provide a comprehensive data analytics and visualization platform for actionable insights.

Our product has a wide range of uses cases and our clients include small businesses and Fortune 100s. Domains include aviation/airports, security, engineering, government, warehousing, and many more.

We strongly believe that in building an autonomous future centered around human beings.

We are venture backed, have been in business for 8 years, and have around 15 employees.

Due to growth, we are hiring a hiring a Remote Forward Deployed Engineer with the following experience:

  • Enterprise client facing experience
  • Some technical experience with integrations, systems, APIs, databases, etc.
  • Python

Experience with the following is a big plus, but not required:

  • Robotics
  • Logistics, supply chain, and/or warehousing
  • AI, LLMs

This role consists of around 30% travel.

You will be working post sales with our enterprise customers assisting our enterprise with integrations, solutioning, prototypes, and POCs.

On the technical side, you will be using Python, and helping to implement and integrate systems and software, working with APIs, and databases.

Top Reasons to Work with Us

  • Remote: permanently 100% remote 
  • Compensation: $160-$190k
  • Equity: we are offering equity
  • Technology: cutting edge robotics tech
  • Ownership: own large accounts
  • Culture: modern, supportive start-up culture

What You Will Be Doing

  • Own end to end AI implementations with our enterprise customers
  • Dig into ambiguous customer requirements into real, deployed solutions
  • Rapid prototyping balanced with AI and product reliability
  • Act as the voice of the customer and the bridge between clients and our technical teams

Must Have:

  • Robotics
  • Logistics, supply chain, and/or warehousing
  • AI, LLMs

Nice to Have:

  • Robotics
  • Logistics, supply chain, and/or warehousing
  • AI, LLMs

What's In It for You

  • $160k-$190k + Benefits, 401k, PTO, Equity
  • Equity
  • Vacation/PTO
  • Medical
  • Dental
  • Vision
  • Bonus
  • 401k

 

Colorado employees will receive paid sick leave. For additional information about available benefits, please contact Matt Abbasfard

 (Nina)
body:
Here is also that new link: Webex Meeting
https://appleinc.webex.com/appleinc/j.php?MTID=m4c3ce3eaaec518d8f5658fb31ee163ab



Interviewer: Sachin Lamba- https://www.linkedin.com/in/sachin-lamba-333422b1/

**Prep- 45 Minute interview primarily on React Coding and some questions on the must haves. **



🔹 React Architecture & Performance

  1.  How would you architect and structure a React dashboard from scratch?

  2.  How do you prevent unnecessary re-renders in data-heavy applications? (useMemo, useCallback, React.memo?)

  3.  Describe a performance issue you solved in a React app.

________________________________
🔹 State Management & APIs

  1.  When and why would you use Redux vs Context API?

  2.  How do you handle async API calls, loading states, and error handling?

  3.  How do you manage server state vs UI state in a scalable app?

________________________________
🔹 JavaScript, CSS & Material UI

  1.  What ES6+ features do you use most often in production?

  2.  How do you approach responsive layout and styling in dashboards?

  3.  What is your experience customizing Material UI components and themes?

________________________________
🔹 Testing

  1.  How do you test React components (Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress)?

  2.  What’s the difference between unit, integration, and E2E tests?

subject: Nina Gong- UI Engineer
body:
React Engineer

ABOUT THIS FEATURED OPPORTUNITY

We are seeking a highly skilled UI Engineer (React) to build a management reporting dashboard from the ground up. This dashboard will deliver nuanced reporting to executive leadership and surface highly sensitive finance data.

This is an individual contributor role where you will partner cross-functionally with engineering, product, and finance teams to design and develop a scalable, secure, and high-performance reporting experience.

________________________________
THE OPPORTUNITY FOR YOU

You will own the end-to-end UI development of a mission-critical executive dashboard. From architecture decisions to component design and performance optimization, youll play a key role in shaping a polished, data-driven user experience.

Youll collaborate closely with backend engineers and stakeholders to ensure accurate data representation, intuitive workflows, and secure handling of finance-sensitive information. This is an opportunity to build something impactful from scratch with visibility at the executive level.

________________________________
KEY SUCCESS FACTORS (Top 3 Must Haves)

1. Strong React Expertise (57 Years)

  *   Deep experience building production-grade React applications

  *   Advanced knowledge of React Hooks, component lifecycle, performance optimization, and memoization

  *   Proven experience building UI dashboards from scratch

2. State Management & API Integration

  *   Hands-on experience with Redux and API state management

  *   Strong understanding of asynchronous data handling and scalable front-end architecture

3. Core Front-End Foundations & Testing

  *   Strong proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+ preferred), HTML, and CSS

  *   Experience with modern CSS frameworks Open to any of those (Tailwind, Styled Components, CSS Modules, Sass, etc.)

  *   Material UI needed for web components

  *   Experience with testing frameworks Open to any (EX: Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress, or similar)

NICE TO HAVES

  *   TypeScript experience

  *   Experience working with executive-level reporting or finance data

  *   TypeScript experience
